title: Switch Open VSX workflow submodule checkout to PAT secret

source.subject: ci: use PAT secret for private pckg submodule checkout

body:
Switches Open VSX workflow submodule checkout to a **PAT secret** for private repos.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`8e3b883`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8e3b883)
- **Subject:** ci: use PAT secret for private pckg submodule checkout
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Follow-up when `GITHUB_TOKEN` scope was insufficient.
